testcase.name: myTest

failure.message:
Exception in clickOnSelectBasedOnFareType: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1141, 526). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=120.0.6099.110) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [451a8cc3b3ce2015325ba94334e34e71, clickElement {id=EF173F237FC4678D3FCEBBEEE4E9EC92_element_670}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 120.0.6099.110, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 120.0.6099.109 (3419140ab66..., userDataDir: C:\Users\LENOVO\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51837}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51837/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 120.0.6099.110, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (451a8cc3b3ce2015325ba94334e34e71)] -> xpath: //div[contains(@class,'tg-fare-type') and text()='Flexi']/parent::div/parent::div/following-sibling::div[@class='action']//button] Session ID: 451a8cc3b3ce2015325ba94334e34e71
